response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the experience requirement with 19+ years of demonstrated technical seniority at Staff level, the role explicitly requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products and platforms built with AI. The candidate's AI work is recent (since April 2025) and supplementary to their primary role, lacking the strategic AI expertise, thought leadership, and product track record essential for advising customers on cutting-edge AI adoption and identifying AI-driven differentiation opportunities. The absence of an AI-focused Master's degree or PhD further weakens fit for this specialized strategy role.
strengths: 19+ years of engineering experience with clear progression to Staff-level seniority, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Broad technical depth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems demonstrates adaptability and platform understanding
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows awareness of emerging AI landscape
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published research, products, or platforms despite role's explicit focus on AI strategy and innovation
Missing preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; AI work appears recent and supplementary rather than core expertise
No evidence of strategic advisory relationship with enterprise customers or recognized thought leadership in AI/cloud technology adoption

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and seniority level
